## Security Checklist

- [ ] Rate limiting applied to endpoints
- [ ] Input validation on all endpoints
- [ ] Error messages don't expose internals

- [ ] API response times within SLA (<100ms)

- [ ] No memory leaks introduced
- [ ] Caching strategy evaluated
